tools_allowed: git local; runner cabina; gh read/write solo bajo gate

responsibility: verificar remoto, branch, PRs, tags, divergencias
tools_allowed: git remote; git ls-remote; gh repo/pr

responsibility: exigir owner, reviewer, rollback, postcheck y evidencia
bloquear secretos, live, force push y permisos peligrosos
tools_blocked: secret print; live write; prod perms

responsibility: revisar workflows, path filters, metadata, YAML, CODEOWNERS
validar docs por capas y evitar duplicar evidencia viva
controlar gh, Dependabot, labels y checks
evitar carreras entre push, PR, tag y merge
tools_blocked: merge sin HEAD fijo; tag antes de checks
